title: Giant Snake hit prevents target Atk damage

card.rawText: When this creature hits, the targeted creature cannot inflict Atk damage. Once per turn, they may roll 1 die. If the result is 3-6, this effect ends.

effect.value: Cannot inflict Atk damage until escape roll succeeds

plan.title: Giant Snake hit prevents target Atk damage
plan.summary: On hit, verify target creature cannot inflict Atk damage and gets an escape roll.

notes: Place Giant Snake as player_1 primary creature and run a deterministic battle.
When this creature hits, the targeted creature cannot inflict Atk damage. Once per turn, they may roll 1 die. If the result is 3-6, this effect ends.

steps: Run battle and land a hit.
Apply status with escape roll to target.
manualVerification: Verify against card text: When this creature hits, the targeted creature cannot inflict Atk damage. Once per turn, they may roll 1 die. If the result is 3-6, this effect ends.
riskNotes: A red result marks missing or incomplete runtime support for this rules text.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
